atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the `@apply` directive to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the `@layer` directive to tell Tailwind which 'bucket' a set of custom styles belong to.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use the `@config` directive to specify the path to your Tailwind configuration file.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use the `@theme` directive to configure Tailwind CSS v4 theme values.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Use the `@plugin` directive to include custom plugins in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Use the `@utility` directive to define custom utilities in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Use the `@variant` directive to define custom variants in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Use the `@custom-variant` directive to define custom variants.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Use the `@source` directive to explicitly define source files for Tailwind CSS v4.
